content_metadata.document_title_txt: “Vera boys” open Cuatro Hermanos Meat Market

chunks.content_original:
By Melissa Cantu Trevino/mtrevino@cherryroad.com

SAN DIEGO – Fresh prime meat at reasonable prices can be found at the newest meat market in South Texas. Cuatro Hermanos Meat Market is owned by Nicholas, Gabriel, Danny and Adrian Vera, also known as the “Vera boys.”

The meat market is located at 1018 E. Gravis Street.

![](https://www.alicetx.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/09/AT2Q5543-scaled.jpg)Photo by Melissa Cantu Trevino

The Vera family brainstormed the idea of opening their own business within the community they grew up in.

Nicholas said they knew there was a need for a meat market and decided to “open up the business and take a chance.”

![](https://www.alicetx.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/09/AT2Q5582-scaled.jpg)Photo by Melissa Cantu Trevino

Gabriel has worked at local meat markets and has a degree in Agricultural Sciences. He believes his knowledge will help give customers the best meat products at reasonable prices.
chunks.content:
By Melissa Cantu Trevino/mtrevino@cherryroad.com

SAN DIEGO – Fresh prime meat at reasonable prices can be found at the newest meat market in South Texas. Cuatro Hermanos Meat Market is owned by Nicholas, Gabriel, Danny and Adrian Vera, also known as the “Vera boys.”

The meat market is located at 1018 E. Gravis Street.

![](https://www.alicetx.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/09/AT2Q5543-scaled.jpg)Photo by Melissa Cantu Trevino

The Vera family brainstormed the idea of opening their own business within the community they grew up in.

Nicholas said they knew there was a need for a meat market and decided to “open up the business and take a chance.”

![](https://www.alicetx.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/09/AT2Q5582-scaled.jpg)Photo by Melissa Cantu Trevino

Gabriel has worked at local meat markets and has a degree in Agricultural Sciences. He believes his knowledge will help give customers the best meat products at reasonable prices.

chunks.content_original:
![](https://www.alicetx.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/09/AT2Q5553-scaled.jpg)Photo by Melissa Cantu Trevino

Aside from fajitas, tripas, steaks, and other meats, the Cuatro Hermanos Meat Market carry products like sausage, chorizo, and spices that are made in-house by Gabriel.

![](https://www.alicetx.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/09/AT2Q5544-scaled.jpg)Photo by Melissa Cantu Trevino

The future goal is to be able to process livestock and wild game.

The ribbon-cutting ceremony was a partnership between the business and the Alice HUB City Chamber of Commerce.

![](https://www.alicetx.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/09/AT2Q5548-scaled.jpg)Photo by Melissa Cantu Trevino

For more information or to order from Cuatro Hermanos Meat Market visit them on Facebook or call 361-209-5008.

For more information or to order from Cuatro Hermanos Meat Market visit them on Facebook or call 361-209-5008.

markdown_content:
By Melissa Cantu Trevino/mtrevino@cherryroad.com

SAN DIEGO – Fresh prime meat at reasonable prices can be found at the newest meat market in South Texas. Cuatro Hermanos Meat Market is owned by Nicholas, Gabriel, Danny and Adrian Vera, also known as the “Vera boys.”

The meat market is located at 1018 E. Gravis Street.

![](https://www.alicetx.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/09/AT2Q5543-scaled.jpg)Photo by Melissa Cantu Trevino

The Vera family brainstormed the idea of opening their own business within the community they grew up in.

Nicholas said they knew there was a need for a meat market and decided to “open up the business and take a chance.”

![](https://www.alicetx.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/09/AT2Q5582-scaled.jpg)Photo by Melissa Cantu Trevino

Gabriel has worked at local meat markets and has a degree in Agricultural Sciences. He believes his knowledge will help give customers the best meat products at reasonable prices.

![](https://www.alicetx.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/09/AT2Q5553-scaled.jpg)Photo by Melissa Cantu Trevino

Aside from fajitas, tripas, steaks, and other meats, the Cuatro Hermanos Meat Market carry products like sausage, chorizo, and spices that are made in-house by Gabriel.

![](https://www.alicetx.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/09/AT2Q5544-scaled.jpg)Photo by Melissa Cantu Trevino

The future goal is to be able to process livestock and wild game.

The ribbon-cutting ceremony was a partnership between the business and the Alice HUB City Chamber of Commerce.

![](https://www.alicetx.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/09/AT2Q5548-scaled.jpg)Photo by Melissa Cantu Trevino

For more information or to order from Cuatro Hermanos Meat Market visit them on Facebook or call 361-209-5008.

cleaned_content:
SAN DIEGO – Fresh prime meat at reasonable prices can be found at the newest meat market in South Texas. Cuatro Hermanos Meat Market is owned by Nicholas, Gabriel, Danny and Adrian Vera, also known as the “Vera boys.”

The meat market is located at 1018 E. Gravis Street.

The Vera family brainstormed the idea of opening their own business within the community they grew up in.

Nicholas said they knew there was a need for a meat market and decided to “open up the business and take a chance.”

Gabriel has worked at local meat markets and has a degree in Agricultural Sciences. He believes his knowledge will help give customers the best meat products at reasonable prices.

Aside from fajitas, tripas, steaks, and other meats, the Cuatro Hermanos Meat Market carry products like sausage, chorizo, and spices that are made in-house by Gabriel.

The future goal is to be able to process livestock and wild game.

The ribbon-cutting ceremony was a partnership between the business and the Alice HUB City Chamber of Commerce.
